name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Freezing rain and patchy fog before 10pm, then rain and patchy fog between 10pm and 4am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain between 4am and 5am. Cloudy, with a low around 30. West wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
